ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation - Flight AB1234
ham.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

Thank you for booking with Air India. Your flight itinerary is confirmed. Please find details below.

Passenger: Mr. Rajesh Sharma
Booking Reference: AI123456
Flight: Air India AB1234
Departure: New Delhi (DEL) - 10:30 AM, 12th May 2024
Arrival: Mumbai (BOM) - 12:45 PM, 12th May 2024
Gate: 3B
Seat: 12A

Please arrive at the airport at least 2 hours before departure. For check‑in, you can use our online portal at <URL> or the Air India mobile app.

If you have any changes to your itinerary or need assistance, contact our 24/7 support at +91-123-456-7890 or email support@airindia.com.

Thank you for choosing Air India. We look forward to serving you.

Best regards,
Air India Customer Support

spam.subject: URGENT: Your FedEx Shipment #FDX987654 - Immediate Payment Required
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

We regret to inform you that your FedEx shipment with tracking number FDX987654 has been delayed due to a missed delivery. As per our records, a delivery fee of INR 2,500 is now due to cover the cost of holding the package.

To avoid cancellation of your shipment, please complete the payment within the next 24 hours. Failure to pay may result in the package being returned to the sender or a permanent removal from our system.

Click <URL> to log in to your FedEx account and submit the payment. Please ensure you use the correct tracking number FDX987654.

If you have any questions, call our customer support at +91-987-654-3210 or reply to this email.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Regards,
FedEx India Customer Service
